the global ocean covers 71% of the

at the Deep's upper limit lies The
Twilight
Zone where the diminished light of the

with the average depth of the ocean
being almost four times deeper and the
deepest known Point found at a depth of
11,000 M The Twilight Zone is little
more than a

lier the ocean's subsequent zones each

expanse the midnight zone or bathy
pelagic stretches to 4 km down a place
so deep that the direct influences of
the Sun the waves and the tides are not

changed at all in millions of years

at its lower limits the abyssopelagic

plain a realm of mud

dwellers at just a few SES around the

one ROV Sebastian a robot owned and

Institute it is the size of a small

Twilight and midnight zones
controlled from the surface vessel via

deep and reveals a glimpse at the veiled
expanse beneath the ocean surface
but before we reach such depths we must
pass through the epipelagic or sunlight
zone which spans the upper limit of the
water column down to a depth of 200
M it's a vibrant World more than 90% of
all marine life dwells here and much of

coral in the tropics where food shelter
and reproductive partners not in short
supply even out in the high seas the

[Music]

waters
by developing a gas-filled float called
a neum metaphor the Portuguese man of

are used to
feed they are members of the newon a

reside at the interface of air and
water primary production is made
possible near the surface by the rays of
sunlight that filter through the waves
microscopic plant-like animals called
phytoplankton take on the role of
producers converting water and carbon
dioxide into oxygen and glucose via
photosynthesis the biomass produced by
this process supports all non-
chemosynthetic life in the
oceans and without it the depths below

prey siphonophores related to fish are

Bells assisting in propulsion in much

the colonial way of life mirrors that of

it's less likely to affect the entire
Colony they repeatedly clone themselves
and can become a effectively

synchronous migration on planet
Earth it's been postulated that animals
May migrate at night to remain in their

metric tons of organisms migrate up

dense that it was first discovered when
Echo Sounders on board World War II US
Navy vessels detected the Gathering of
animals as a mysterious second flaw in
the ocean far shallower than the ocean
bottom was thought to be as a gathering
of creatures from vastly different
groups the migration is a vertical Feast
that fuels the ocean's food
web take the lon fish for
example they are the most widely
distributed and abundant vertebrates on
the planet with an estimated Global
biomass of up to 16 gatons and
accounting for 65% of all all fish

they are a crucial food supply for many

[Music]
webs their most notable predators are

sh the reason is unknown it may be an

other cannibalism is Rife among Red
